## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**BOM_BACKUP_HEADER** -> USER_INFORMATION (USER_ID -> USER_ID)

**BOM_BACKUP_MSTR** -> BOM_BACKUP_HEADER (BOM_ID->BOM_ID, REVISION->REVISION); UM_CODES (UM_INVENTORY -> CODE); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**BOM_CHANGES** -> BOM_MSTR (BOM->PARENT, BOM_SEQ->SEQUENCE_BOM); USER_INFORMATION (CHANGE_USER -> GS_USER)

**BOM_CUTLIST** -> BOM_CUTLIST_NOTES (CUTLIST_ITEM -> ITEM); BOM_MSTR (PART -> PARENT); INVENTORY_MSTR (COMPONENT -> PART); JOB_HEADER (JOB->JOB, SCHEDULE_NO->JOB, SCHEDULE_SUFFIX->SUFFIX, SUFFIX->SUFFIX); JOB_OPERATIONS (SEQ -> SEQ); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCATION -> LOCN); RTR_CUT_SHAPE (PROPERTY_CODE -> SHAPE_CODE); WORKCENTERS (NEXT_WORKCTR->MACHINE, WORKCENTER->MACHINE)

**BOM_CUTLIST_NOTES** -> BOM_CUTLIST (COMPONENT->COMPONENT, ITEM->CUTLIST_ITEM, PARENT->PART, WO->JOB, WO_SEQ->SEQ, WO_SUFFIX->SUFFIX)

**BOM_ENG** -> BOM_MSTR (PART->PART, SIMILAR->PARENT); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCATION -> LOCN)

**BOM_MSTR** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); ROUTER_LINE (ROUTER_SEQ -> LINE_ROUTER); UM_CODES (UM_INVENTORY -> CODE); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**BOM_NOTES** -> BOM_MSTR (PARENT->PARENT, PARENT_INS->INSERT_BOM, PARENT_SEQ->SEQUENCE_BOM)

**BOM_XREF** -> BOM_MSTR (PARENT -> PARENT); CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST -> CUSTOMER); INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); INV_CROSS_REF (CUST_PART->CUSTOMER_PART, MFG_PART->MFG_PART); VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR -> VENDOR)
